body_text: In this epic Total War sale, immerse yourself in the ultimate strategy gaming experience, with discounts on some of our most iconic games.Total War games give you the chance to leave your own mark on history. Featuring a mix of turn-based empire building and colossal real-time land and naval battles, experience some of history's most thrilling and tumultuous eras, from Ancient Rome and Medieval Europe to feudal Japan and the Three Kingdoms period in China.

Featuring a mix of turn-based empire building and colossal real-time land and naval battles, experience some of history's most thrilling and tumultuous eras, from Ancient Rome and Medieval Europe to feudal Japan and the Three Kingdoms period in China. [/p][p][/p]

announcement_body.headline: TOTAL WAR Historic Franchise Sale
announcement_body.body: [p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/32528477/ace4dc74a0d0ecc92e366b45325019b8e8ef5da3.jpg"][/img][/p][p]In this epic Total War sale, immerse yourself in the ultimate strategy gaming experience, with discounts on some of our most iconic games.[/p][p]Total War games give you the chance to leave your own mark on history. Featuring a mix of turn-based empire building and colossal real-time land and naval battles, experience some of history's most thrilling and tumultuous eras, from Ancient Rome and Medieval Europe to feudal Japan and the Three Kingdoms period in China. [/p][p][/p]

announcement_body.body:
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/32528477/37714df97c70a6adcda05f217b30c80d3ca280c2.jpg[/img]
In Total War: PHARAOH, the newest entry in the award-winning grand strategy series, immerse yourself in ancient Egypt at the zenith of its power and experience the dramatic events that threaten its destruction.
